name: New Claim - Prefers a Human Agent
description: Caller declines self-service and wants to be connected to a specialist.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: I don't want to deal with a website. Can I just talk to a person about my warranty?
expectedOutcome: Agent offers self-service once, and on persistence connects the caller to a warranty specialist gracefully without trapping them in the link flow.
